headline: Ford, GM EV Sales Plummet. What That Means for the Stocks.
summary: Thursday,  Ford Motor  reported first-quarter U.S. sales.  Fourth-quarter sales fell after buyers rushed to beat the September expiration of the $7,500 federal EV purchase tax credit.  First quarter hybrid electric vehicle sales were 51,073, down 20% from a year ago, accounting for 9% of total car sales, down 1 percentage point from a year ago.

raw.headline: Ford, GM EV Sales Plummet. What That Means for the Stocks.

headline: April 2026's Top Stocks Estimated To Be Below Fair Value
summary: In the last week, the United States market has remained flat, yet over the past 12 months it has experienced a notable rise of 16%, with earnings projected to grow by 15% annually. In this environment, identifying stocks that are potentially undervalued can offer opportunities for investors seeking to capitalize on assets priced below their estimated fair value.
